specs.title: cp-000: Clearing all filters shows every project
cp-001: Each row represents one project
cp-002: Rows render in order from API updated_at DESC
cp-003: Hovering the status button reveals the CaretDown icon on the badge control
cp-004: Clicking the status badgecaret opens the Status Update Modal
cp-005: Table is wrapped in a horizontal overflow container
cp-006: Edit navigates correctly to the studio page for that project
cp-007: Archive triggers archiveProjectid server action
cp-008: Delete triggers deleteProjectid server action
cp-009: All actions target the correct project ID
cp-010: Projects displayed in a responsive grid of cards
cp-011: Each card has a fixed brand-colored bar at the top
cp-012: Type icon displayed on card
cp-013: Status badge displayed on card
cp-014: Project title prominent
cp-015: Subtitle line type lastEdited format
cp-016: Footer line uses Files and FileText icons with singularplural counts paperpapers
cp-017: Cards are clickable or have clear navigation affordance
cp-018: Grid adapts columns based on viewport width
cp-019: Cards share a consistent structure while final height remains content-driven
cp-020: Filteringsearchtabs work identically in grid view as in list view
cp-021: All 13 project types map to exactly one of the 5 icon groups
cp-022: Icons render at appropriate size in both list and grid views
cp-023: Badges display the correct text label
cp-024: Badge color matches the status mapping
cp-025: Badges appear consistently in both list rows and grid cards
cp-026: Clicking New Project button opens modal
cp-027: Clicking Create Your First Project empty state opens modal
cp-028: Modal has X close button
cp-029: Clicking outside modal or pressing Escape closes it
cp-030: Title New Project
cp-031: Original Article
cp-032: Review Article default
cp-033: Systematic Review
cp-034: Meta-Analysis
